Video.summary: Make kitchen curtains with The Crafty Chica
Video.title: The Crafty Chica: Kitchen Curtains

Image.alt: The Crafty Chica: Kitchen Curtains
The Crafty Chica: Kitchen Curtains

Video.summary: Make your own washi tape!
Video.title: The Crafty Chica: Washi Tape

Image.alt: The Crafty Chica: Washi Tape
The Crafty Chica: Washi Tape

Video.summary: Watch this DIY video tutorial to learn How to make a Spring Wreath. Adding colorful spring wreaths to your home is a fabulous way to make your space blossom with very little effort. Follow along with this home decor craft tutorial to create a stunning and bright project. This DIY craft is easy to make, and you can use just about any fabric you would like. Get started on your own DIY wreath for the most cheerful of seasons!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath
FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Video.summary: While picking out the perfect gift for dad can be tempting, sometimes a gift card is an even better idea. As they say, it is the thought that counts! With this Toolbox Fathers Day Craft, you can learn how to make the perfect gift for dad. By creating a DIY craft to keep the gift card tucked into, you give your dad some handmade love and something useful at the same time. Plus, you could easily use this homemade box to wrap up some homemade candies, as well.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft
FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft

Video.summary: What's up guys! For today's Frog Food we are making paper dolls from start to finish. From poses to clothing we've got ya covered, so sit back, relax and enjoy!!
Video.title: Digital Painting - Frog Food: Draw With Me - Paper Dolls

Image.alt: Digital Painting - Frog Food: Draw With Me - Paper Dolls
Digital Painting - Frog Food: Draw With Me - Paper Dolls

Video.summary: Paper rolls take on a colorful twist- join Kim in creating giant crayons.
Video.title: The Best Ideas For Kids: Paper Roll Crayons

Image.alt: The Best Ideas For Kids: Paper Roll Crayons
The Best Ideas For Kids: Paper Roll Crayons

Video.summary: Make a handmade journal with The Crafty Chica
Video.title: The Crafty Chica: Handmade Journal

Image.alt: The Crafty Chica: Handmade Journal
The Crafty Chica: Handmade Journal

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show, we make spring floral door wreaths and candy wrapper bracelets.
Video.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Springtime for the Whole Family

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Springtime for the Whole Family
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Springtime for the Whole Family

Video.summary: "Learn how to make a Potted Faux Flower Craft as a DIY centerpiece for springtime, bridal showers, baby showers, and more! This video tutorial shows you how to make a faux flower as well as a vase for your brand new bloom. This easy die cut craft is perfect for spring decorating, and unlike real plants, this flower craft is low maintenance and can go anywhere in your home! Be sure to watch this DIY craft tutorial for a spring craft idea you'll love. "
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Potted Faux Flower Craft

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Potted Faux Flower Craft
FaveCrafts: Potted Faux Flower Craft

Video.summary: Whether you're a beginner or advanced knitter, learn and practice the Art of Knitting with the best designers and instructors in America!
Video.title: The Art of Knitting: Spinning Fiber

Image.alt: The Art of Knitting: Spinning Fiber
The Art of Knitting: Spinning Fiber

Video.summary: Mother Nature always wins. So when you make outdoor furniture you have two choices: commit to a regular maintenance schedule or come to terms with the weathered gray look. An easy thing you can do to help the cause is to prevent moisture from entering into the legs. This simple trick requires nothing more than epoxy and masking tape.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Protecting Outdoor Furniture with Epoxy Feet

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Protecting Outdoor Furniture with Epoxy Feet
The Wood Whisperer: Protecting Outdoor Furniture with Epoxy Feet

Video.summary: I spend a lot of time helping new woodworkers solve problems. This gives me a unique perspective on the potential stumble point that most woodworkers will experience. Eventually, these things become woodworking common sense but until that time, I consider it woodworking not-so-common sense. So here are five tips that most woodworkers eventually figure out on their own.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Woodworking Not-So-Common Sense

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Woodworking Not-So-Common Sense
The Wood Whisperer: Woodworking Not-So-Common Sense

Video.summary: Making your own plantation shutters is actually pretty easy with the help fo Rockler.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: I Made My Own Plantation Shutters

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: I Made My Own Plantation Shutters
The Wood Whisperer: I Made My Own Plantation Shutters

Video.summary: Most videos about sharpening, including my own, focus on how to tune up an old tool or properly set a new one. Thankfully, once you do that process it isn't likely you'll have to do it again for a very long time. From that point on, you'll be sharpening in maintenance mode.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: 60 Seconds to Sharp

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: 60 Seconds to Sharp
The Wood Whisperer: 60 Seconds to Sharp

Video.summary: A close look at the installation and use of the Laguna DriftMaster Fence System.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: A Sweet Bandsaw Upgrade

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: A Sweet Bandsaw Upgrade
The Wood Whisperer: A Sweet Bandsaw Upgrade

Video.summary: After installing the Clear Vue CV1800 cyclone, the next step was to install the Nordfab ductwork. This video shows you how I did the job and how this system works.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Installing Nordfab Ductwork

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Installing Nordfab Ductwork
The Wood Whisperer: Installing Nordfab Ductwork

Video.summary: This video shows you how to build the Wall-Hanging Magazine Rack, designed by Glen Huey. And because I don't like to leave well enough alone, I'll also show you an alternative version of the magazine rack that employs a few of my personal design changes.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Wall-Hanging Magazine Rack

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Wall-Hanging Magazine Rack
The Wood Whisperer: Wall-Hanging Magazine Rack

Video.summary: C-channel is one of the most overrated concepts in woodworking.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: C-Channel is Overrated!

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: C-Channel is Overrated!
The Wood Whisperer: C-Channel is Overrated!

Video.summary: A wall-hanging cabinet to help you organize and store your drill and router bits.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Bit Storage Cabinet

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Bit Storage Cabinet
The Wood Whisperer: Bit Storage Cabinet

Video.summary: A hassle-free method for setting up a dado blade with no measuring! All it takes is a flat surface and one of the most sensitive measuring devices in your shop: your fingers!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Setting Up a Dado Blade

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Setting Up a Dado Blade
The Wood Whisperer: Setting Up a Dado Blade

Video.summary: Ever wish you could fast forward 5 years and see how your projects are holding up? That would certainly be useful information as it would let you know what worked, and what didn’t. So in this episode, I pull out a number of old projects and examine them closely for damage, flaws and evidence of wood movement.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Lessons Learned from Past Projects

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Lessons Learned from Past Projects
The Wood Whisperer: Lessons Learned from Past Projects

Video.summary: Here’s a quick review of the dust and fumes that can make our lives miserable in the shop, and why we need respirators for pro-active protection. And below you will find a links to the exact respirator setup I like to use: the 3m 7500 Series.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Respirators in the Wood Shop aka Dust In Time

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Respirators in the Wood Shop aka Dust In Time
The Wood Whisperer: Respirators in the Wood Shop aka Dust In Time

Video.summary: Almost before I realized what was happening, I found myself fully engaged in phase 2 of my garage to shop conversion. 2x4s were purchased, nails were driven, and organization was born!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Shop Update - Tool Wall - Garage Door Cover - New Fans - DC Upgrades

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Shop Update - Tool Wall - Garage Door Cover - New Fans - DC Upgrades
The Wood Whisperer: Shop Update - Tool Wall - Garage Door Cover - New Fans - DC Upgrades

Video.summary: Tools I think you should buy as well as tools I think you should avoid.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Buy This Not That - Measuring and Marking

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Buy This Not That - Measuring and Marking
The Wood Whisperer: Buy This Not That - Measuring and Marking

Video.summary: Festool's new CMS Router Table hits the market in October 2012. Here's a first look at some of the main features and add-ons!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Festool CMS Router Table

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Festool CMS Router Table
The Wood Whisperer: Festool CMS Router Table

Video.summary: The bed comes to life with the completion of the hardware and the support system!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Platform Bed - Hardware - Supports - Finish

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Platform Bed - Hardware - Supports - Finish
The Wood Whisperer: Platform Bed - Hardware - Supports - Finish

Video.summary: We find some mystery dust in the walls which causes us to pivot to the kitchen remodel.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Scary Mystery Dust and Kitchen Remodel

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Scary Mystery Dust and Kitchen Remodel
The Wood Whisperer: Scary Mystery Dust and Kitchen Remodel

Video.summary: We finish up building the Trestle Table and focus on Braces, Top, Wedges & Finishing.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Knock Down Trestle Table Part 2

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Knock Down Trestle Table Part 2
The Wood Whisperer: Knock Down Trestle Table Part 2

Video.summary: Today I'm going to show you how to make a simple but elegant pizza peel and I'll throw in a bonus tomato pie recipe! A pizza peel is a giant spatula intended to deliver a raw pizza to the oven as well as pull the cooked pizza out.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: How to Make a Pizza Peel

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: How to Make a Pizza Peel
The Wood Whisperer: How to Make a Pizza Peel

Video.summary: A workbench cabinet that will last for generations!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Fancy Workbench Cabinet With String Inlay

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Fancy Workbench Cabinet With String Inlay
The Wood Whisperer: Fancy Workbench Cabinet With String Inlay

Video.summary: As much as I would love to show you all the details of my current project, time just won’t allow it. But there is one specific part of the process I wanted to show you: making the raised panels.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: A Fancy Raised Panel

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: A Fancy Raised Panel
The Wood Whisperer: A Fancy Raised Panel

Video.summary: We take a fast-paced look at how a platform bed went together and gives you a broad overview of the techniques and tools used. We break down rough stock and create the massive footboard.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Platform Bed - The Footboard

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Platform Bed - The Footboard
The Wood Whisperer: Platform Bed - The Footboard

Video.summary: Its no secret that Google SketchUp is a very popular program amongst woodworkers. Considering what it does, its incredibly easy to use. But it can still be intimidating to someone who is using it for the first time. So with the help of my buddy Aaron Marshall, we put together a few videos showing how to construct the square lid to the Steamer Trunk.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: SketchUp Basics - Trunk Lid Part 1

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: SketchUp Basics - Trunk Lid Part 1
The Wood Whisperer: SketchUp Basics - Trunk Lid Part 1

Video.summary: Madonna teaches Open Suns.
Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 16 - Open Suns

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 16 - Open Suns
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 16 - Open Suns

Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 19 - CT Linked Flowers

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 19 - CT Linked Flowers
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 19 - CT Linked Flowers

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 3 - Cluster 6 Alternating

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 12 - Wormholes

Video.summary: Madonna teaches Triangle Double-Bar Wells.
Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 6 - Triangle Double-Bar Wells

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 6 - Triangle Double-Bar Wells
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 6 - Triangle Double-Bar Wells

Video.summary: Watch this video tutorial to learn how to make a colorful Felt Flower Corsage Craft. Adding a chic and cute DIY corsage to your event can really make your quirky and crafty nature stand out. This craft tutorial shows you how to create felt flowers and combine then with a pipe cleaner to make a charming DIY corsage. This felt craft idea would be a fantastic wearable craft to make for bridal shower guests or the flower girl at your wedding.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Felt Flower Corsage Craft

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Felt Flower Corsage Craft
FaveCrafts: Felt Flower Corsage Craft

Video.summary: Madonna teaches Knotted Web.
Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 21 - Knotted Web

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 21 - Knotted Web
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 21 - Knotted Web
